jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Apollo Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Apollo Hospitals are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
